version_reason: Add explicit occurrence disambiguation and separate provider-reported model identity from canonical requested-model family.

location_contract.occurrence_index_semantics: Zero-based occurrence of exact source_excerpt in source_text, ordered by start position.

model_identity_contract.provider_reported_model: recorded per response without requiring byte-identical aliases across cases
model_identity_contract.canonical_model_family: derived only by frozen exact-or-dated-snapshot rules
model_identity_contract.finalization_rule: all cases must map to the single requested canonical model family

cardinality_rules: Every source anchor must contain at least one Claim.
One source anchor may contain multiple non-overlapping Claims.
No exactly-one-central or exactly-one-anchor-claim constraint exists.
